summary.one_liner: Analyzed 89 written reviews from the App Store spread across 5 Countries.

quotes.author: jv4
quotes.text: I love being able to quickly find recipes, but even better is quickly searching by ingredient.
quotes.excerpt: I love being able to quickly find recipes, but even better is quickly searching by ingredient.

quotes.author: WyndleCook
quotes.text: I love that I can search across all of my books for a single ingredient and see reviews of recipes from other cooks.
quotes.excerpt: I love that I can search across all of my books for a single ingredient and see reviews of recipes from other cooks.

quotes.author: welikegoodfood
quotes.text: We love how we can search by ingredients.
quotes.excerpt: We love how we can search by ingredients.

quotes.author: plumberful
quotes.text: Being able to search by ingredients is a game-changer and I also find it very helpful to quickly search for specific recipes from specific books.
quotes.excerpt: Being able to search by ingredients is a game-changer and I also find it very helpful to quickly search for specific recipes from specific books.

quotes.author: Duehanfkfkfksjahag
quotes.text: I can search for an ingredient I have and see what recipes I can make.
quotes.excerpt: I can search for an ingredient I have and see what recipes I can make.

quotes.author: TabithaYogi
quotes.text: I love collecting cookbooks snd recipes, and I finally have a way to search across all of them.
quotes.excerpt: I love collecting cookbooks snd recipes, and I finally have a way to search across all of them.

quotes.author: SW_DC_Gal
quotes.text: My favorite feature is the ingredient list that it gives for recipes I am searching.
quotes.excerpt: My favorite feature is the ingredient list that it gives for recipes I am searching.

quotes.author: TOTCOOKS
quotes.text: So easy to add your cookbooks by scanning the bar codes and whenever you want to make something but can’t remember what recipes are where you just list an ingredient you have and search all your cookbooks to find recipes.
quotes.excerpt: So easy to add your cookbooks by scanning the bar codes and whenever you want to make something but can’t remember what recipes are where you just list an ingredient you have and…

quotes.author: Rustlethepetals
quotes.text: I can search every recipe in my collection by ingredient!
quotes.excerpt: I can search every recipe in my collection by ingredient!

quotes.author: ChrissyMW
quotes.text: Love the handy digital access to my favorite cookbooks - and the reverse search where I can find recipes that match the contents of my fridge!
quotes.excerpt: Love the handy digital access to my favorite cookbooks - and the reverse search where I can find recipes that match the contents of my fridge!

quotes.author: Untidy me
quotes.text: I’ve already committed to making 50 recipes ( you’d think someone with 88 cookbooks could manage more but here we are ) and have high hopes that my cookery book reading will actually turn into cooking.
quotes.excerpt: I’ve already committed to making 50 recipes ( you’d think someone with 88 cookbooks could manage more but here we are ) and have high hopes that my cookery book reading will…

quotes.author: laughingull
quotes.text: A treasure for the cook with too many cookbooks This app fills a unique niche: it’s for the cook who owns too many cookbooks.
quotes.excerpt: A treasure for the cook with too many cookbooks This app fills a unique niche: it’s for the cook who owns too many cookbooks.

quotes.excerpt: I have the free version with my top 5 cookbooks loaded.

quotes.excerpt: This apps unlocks the power of our 90 odd cookbooks.

quotes.excerpt: I have so many cookbooks and this is just an amazing tool for getting more use out of them!

quotes.text: This app has changed up how I do dinner as before I had so many cookbooks I started to favor some over the others.

quotes.excerpt: This is an amazing app and has finally helped me organise my huge cookbook collection.

quotes.text: So if I’m looking up a recipe while at the store or away from my cookbooks, I had to guess how much to buy.

quotes.text: Especially when I’m at the grocery store & i want to meal plan/meal prep for the night or the week.
quotes.excerpt: Especially when I’m at the grocery store & i want to meal plan/meal prep for the night or the week.

quotes.author: AlabamaSweetHome
quotes.text: I’m not great at Meal Planning, but I think I can manage it better using Cookshelf. I also love that you can check the ingredients of a recipe while you are at the grocery store, just in case you forgot something or want to pursue a new idea.
quotes.excerpt: I’m not great at Meal Planning, but I think I can manage it better using Cookshelf. I also love that you can check the ingredients of a recipe while you are at the grocery store,…

quotes.author: Jake WR
quotes.text: Now I’m making meals I wouldn’t have necessarily noticed before, and I love that they’re adding new features like shopping lists and meal plans.
quotes.excerpt: Now I’m making meals I wouldn’t have necessarily noticed before, and I love that they’re adding new features like shopping lists and meal plans.

quotes.excerpt: I use the shopping list extensively for meal planning so hope they add that soon in an update :)

quotes.author: Untidy me
quotes.text: I LOATHE subscription apps but I’m going make an exception for this one if it goes like I think it’s going to.
quotes.excerpt: I LOATHE subscription apps but I’m going make an exception for this one if it goes like I think it’s going to.

quotes.author: chloegrace1222
quotes.text: I’d rather pay $10 or even $15 upfront if I had to as opposed to $40/year forever.
quotes.excerpt: I’d rather pay $10 or even $15 upfront if I had to as opposed to $40/year forever.

quotes.author: queenOfTheBees
quotes.text: I was hoping it would encourage other users to leave their comments & photos as well, as that is where so much of the value of my subscription lies.
quotes.excerpt: I was hoping it would encourage other users to leave their comments & photos as well, as that is where so much of the value of my subscription lies.

quotes.author: Nhleen
quotes.text: Extremely disappointed that it auto renewed, and despite my cancelling it as soon as I saw the charge, I still have the privilege of paying $40 for the next year for an app I do not use.
quotes.excerpt: Extremely disappointed that it auto renewed, and despite my cancelling it as soon as I saw the charge, I still have the privilege of paying $40 for the next year for an app I do…

quotes.author: HS1983
quotes.text: Asks for a bunch of info then hits you with the subscription fee. I can’t stand how everything is on a subscription model now, instead of letting you just buy it once and use it forever (I don’t mind paying for updates when I’m ready to upgrade but don’t want to pay monthly forever).
quotes.excerpt: Asks for a bunch of info then hits you with the subscription fee. I can’t stand how everything is on a subscription model now, instead of letting you just buy it once and use it…

quotes.author: You again Jane
quotes.text: a subscription would go up each year, or with the feeling that I’m paying $40 every year for the rest of my life (easily $1600+) just to browse my own books.
quotes.excerpt: a subscription would go up each year, or with the feeling that I’m paying $40 every year for the rest of my life (easily $1600+) just to browse my own books.

quotes.author: Anchoraway1234
quotes.text: Why not be honest and upfront and list that it costs $50/ year to basically index recipe TITLES? And for that an annual sub costs the equivalent of a hardcover recipe book.
quotes.excerpt: Why not be honest and upfront and list that it costs $50/ year to basically index recipe TITLES? And for that an annual sub costs the equivalent of a hardcover recipe book.

quotes.author: AbRaPaGe
quotes.text: Why a subscription? I’m so over subscriptions draining my bank account when they aren’t necessary. But having a subscription that’s a bit pricey is just not something I’m willing to do anymore.
quotes.excerpt: Why a subscription? I’m so over subscriptions draining my bank account when they aren’t necessary. But having a subscription that’s a bit pricey is just not something I’m willing…

quotes.text: Personally wouldn’t pay a $60 annual subscription for this service.
quotes.excerpt: Personally wouldn’t pay a $60 annual subscription for this service.

quotes.author: G3rmany
quotes.text: Great idea but library lacking Sadly a lot of my books weren’t on the app at all, and many of the ones that were had not been indexed (which entirely defeats the point of the app, isn’t the point to pay for the index???). After 5 scans it prompted me to subscribe, but having had almost half my collection missing from the app there’s no incentive for me to subscribe. For any value for money the library needs to be extended much wider - many of my books are very popular books. For now I’ve loaded the 5 books I rarely look at and will see how I get on with those

pain_points.title: No full recipe in the app

quotes.author: Dhjbxxbjea
quotes.text: Also, the app only contains the ingredients, it doesn’t include the method; now, there may well be good copyright reasons for that, but the point is if you think this app will replace your recipe books in the kitchen, it won’t.

quotes.author: bad5026
quotes.text: I scanned 3 cookbooks, and I don’t see any recipes, only an ingredients list.
quotes.excerpt: I scanned 3 cookbooks, and I don’t see any recipes, only an ingredients list.

quotes.text: It scanned the ISBN’s of my cookbooks but most needed to be indexed into the app and those that were there, tapped on a recipe and it would show me the ingredients but no directions
quotes.excerpt: It scanned the ISBN’s of my cookbooks but most needed to be indexed into the app and those that were there, tapped on a recipe and it would show me the ingredients but no…

takeaways: Average rating is below 4★ — prioritize fixing the highest-volume complaints.
Lead with your strongest praise themes in marketing and onboarding.
Address top pain points explicitly — many come from mismatched expectations.
Show review count and data sources so buyers trust the sample size.
